message:
fix(demo): center brand title and layout elements based on terminal width

The hero scene and layout scene previously used hardcoded spacing which
caused misalignment on terminals of varying widths. This change introduces
dynamic centering based on actual console width.

Hero scene changes:
- New center_text() helper using Align::center().render()
- Brand title box width calculated from content, not hardcoded
- Both narrow (<50) and full-width layouts now center properly
- Title, subtitle, and powered-by text all respect terminal width
- Box characters (╭╮╰╯│─) dynamically sized to content

Layout scene changes:
- Applied same centering approach for consistent appearance
- Elements now respond to terminal resize

The fix uses the existing Align renderable's center() method, converting
the result back to a positioned string. This maintains consistency with
other centered content throughout the library.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
